zh.Mortagne-du-Nord, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Cala: 法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德莫塔尼-度-諾爾德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Seigneur Evrard IV Radulphe le Jeune de Tournai於1190年出生在比利時海瑙特圖爾奈時，他的父親Baudouin Iv Sire De Mortagne Castellan DE TOURNAI32歲，母親Hildegarde de Wavrin18歲。他於大約1210年與Elisabeth de Nivelle在比利時海瑙特結婚。他在比利時海瑙特圖爾奈被列為 châtelain 。他去世於1226年在他的家鄉享年36歲。

zh-hans.Mortagne-du-Nord, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Cala: 法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德莫塔尼-度-諾爾德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Seigneur Evrard IV Radulphe le Jeune de Tournai于1190年出生在比利时海瑙特圖爾奈时，他的父亲Baudouin Iv Sire De Mortagne Castellan DE TOURNAI32岁，母亲Hildegarde de Wavrin18岁。他于大约1210年与Elisabeth de Nivelle在比利时海瑙特结婚。他在比利时海瑙特圖爾奈被列为 châtelain 。他去世于1226年在他的家乡享年36岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Tournai
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Turney
meanings: habitational name from any of the places in northern France called Tournai-sur-Dive (Orne), Tournay-sur-Odon (Calvados), or Tourny (Eure), or occasionally from Tournai in Hainaut (Belgium).

perhaps occasionally an occupational name from Middle English tournei, turnai ‘lawyer’ (Anglo-Norman French tourné), or a nickname from Middle English tournei(en) ‘(to) joust, take part in a tournament’ (Old French torneier). Compare Turner .

variants.name: Jean
meanings: Like Jane and Joan , a medieval variant of Old French Je(h)anne. Towards the end of the Middle Ages this form became largely confined to Scotland. In the 20th century it became more widely used in the English-speaking world and enjoyed a period of great popularity, but it is now out of fashion. Among numerous well-known and influential bearers are the British novelists Jean Plaidy ( Eleanor Hibbert , 1910–93 ) and Jean Rhys ( Ella Gwendolen Rees Williams , 1894–1979 ), British actress Jean Simmons ( 1929–2010 ), and American-born actress Jean Seberg ( 1938–79 ). It is also found as a variant spelling of the masculine name Gene .

en.lifeSummary: When Seigneur Evrard IV Radulphe le Jeune de Tournai was born in 1190, in Tournai, Hainaut, Belgium, his father, Baudouin Iv Sire De Mortagne Castellan DE TOURNAI, was 32 and his mother, Hildegarde de Wavrin, was 18. He married Elisabeth de Nivelle about 1210, in Hainaut, Belgium. His occupation is listed as  châtelain  in Tournai, Hainaut, Belgium. He died in 1226, in his hometown, at the age of 36.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Seigneur Evrard IV Radulphe le Jeune de Tournai est né en 1190, à Tournai, Hainaut, Belgique, son père, Baudouin Iv Sire De Mortagne Castellan DE TOURNAI, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Hildegarde de Wavrin, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Elisabeth de Nivelle environ 1210, à Hainaut, Belgique. Sa profession de son indiquée est  châtelain  à Tournai, Hainaut, Belgique. Il est décédé en 1226, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 36 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Seigneur Evrard IV Radulphe le Jeune de Tournai 1190 in Tournai, Hennegau, Belgien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Baudouin Iv Sire De Mortagne Castellan DE TOURNAI 32 und seine Mutter Hildegarde de Wavrin 18. Er hat um 1210 in Hennegau, Belgien Elisabeth de Nivelle geheiratet. sein Beruf ist als  châtelain  in Tournai, Hennegau, Belgien aufgeführt. Er starb 1226 im Alter von 36 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Seigneur Evrard IV Radulphe le Jeune de Tournai è nato il nel 1190 nel Tournai, Hainaut, Belgio, il suo padre, Baudouin Iv Sire De Mortagne Castellan DE TOURNAI, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Hildegarde de Wavrin, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Elisabeth de Nivelle circa 1210, nel Hainaut, Belgio. La sua occupazione è indicata come  châtelain  nel Tournai, Hainaut, Belgio. Morì nel 1226, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 36 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Seigneur Evrard IV Radulphe le Jeune de Tournaiが1190年にベルギーヘイナトトウルナイで生まれた時，父Baudouin Iv Sire De Mortagne Castellan DE TOURNAIは32歳，母Hildegarde de Wavrinは18歳であった。約1210年にベルギーヘイナトでElisabeth de Nivelleと結婚した。ベルギーヘイナトトウルナイでの職業は châtelain と記録されている。彼は1226年に故郷で36歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Seigneur Evrard IV Radulphe le Jeune de Tournai(이)가 1190년 벨기에 하인오트 토우른아이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Baudouin Iv Sire De Mortagne Castellan DE TOURNAI(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Hildegarde de Wavrin(은)는 18세였다. 그는 대략 1210년 벨기에 하인오트에서 Elisabeth de Nivelle(와)과 결혼했다. 그의 직업은 벨기에 하인오트 토우른아이에서  châtelain 이었다. 그는 1226년 그의 고향에서 36세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Seigneur Evrard IV Radulphe le Jeune de Tournai nasceu em 1190, em Tournai, Hainaut, Bélgica, seu pai, Baudouin Iv Sire De Mortagne Castellan DE TOURNAI, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Hildegarde de Wavrin, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Elisabeth de Nivelle aproximadamente 1210, em Hainaut, Bélgica. Sua profissão aparece como  châtelain  em Tournai, Hainaut, Bélgica. Ele faleceu em 1226, em sua cidade natal, com 36 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Seigneur Evrard IV Radulphe le Jeune de Tournai родился в 1190 г. в местности тоурнеи, ханаут, Бельгия, его отцу по имени Baudouin Iv Sire De Mortagne Castellan DE TOURNAI было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Hildegarde de Wavrin, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Elisabeth de Nivelle около 1210 г. в местности ханаут, Бельгия.  Он работал по профессии  châtelain  в местности тоурнеи, ханаут, Бельгия. Он умер в 1226 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 36 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Seigneur Evrard IV Radulphe le Jeune de Tournai nació en 1190, en Tournai, Hainaut, Bélgica, su papá, Baudouin Iv Sire De Mortagne Castellan DE TOURNAI, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Hildegarde de Wavrin, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Elisabeth de Nivelle aproximadamente 1210, en Hainaut, Bélgica. Su ocupación registrada era  châtelain  en Tournai, Hainaut, Bélgica. Murió en 1226, en su pueblo, a la edad de 36 años.
